chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَمُوتُ وَ لَا تَتْرُكُ إِلَّا زَوْجَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – The woman dies and she does not leave except for her husband

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/185)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/185)
text: عَنْهُ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَبَلَةَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ .

الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبَانٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْجُعْفِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي امْرَأَةٍ مَاتَتْ وَ تَرَكَتْ زَوْجَهَا قَالَ الْمَالُ لِلزَّوْجِ يَعْنِي إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا وَارِثٌ غَيْرُهُ .

en.hubeali: From him, form Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer, - similar to that.
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from one of his companions, from Aban Bin Ismail Bin Abdul Rahman Al Ju’fy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regard a woman who died and left her husband. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The wealth is for the husband, meaning if there does not happen to be for her an inheritor apart from him’.
en.sarwar: 3. Humayd ibn Ziyad al-Hassan ibn Muhammad ibn Sama‘ah, from Wuhayb from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “About the case of a woman who dies leaving behind just her husband, abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The entire legacy belongs to him (the husband) if no other heirs exist.’” It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jabalah from Ali ibn abu Hamzah from abu Basir a similar Hadith.
